testcase.name: T-API-11 - Verify that Login with valid admin credentials returns a token
T-API-12 - Verify that Login with a wrong password must return a 400 ErrorResponse
testcase.system-err: expected: 400 but was: 401 qatraining.steps.ApiAuthSteps.statusShouldBe(ApiAuthSteps.java:68) ✽.validate the auth response status should be 400(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/auth/api_auth.feature:20)

testcase.name: T-API-13 - Verify that Login with a blank username must return a 400 ErrorResponse
testcase.system-err: expected: 400 but was: 401 qatraining.steps.ApiAuthSteps.statusShouldBe(ApiAuthSteps.java:68) ✽.validate the auth response status should be 400(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/auth/api_auth.feature:27)

testcase.name: T-API-14 - Verify that Login with a blank password must return a 400 ErrorResponse
testcase.system-err: expected: 400 but was: 401 qatraining.steps.ApiAuthSteps.statusShouldBe(ApiAuthSteps.java:68) ✽.validate the auth response status should be 400(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/auth/api_auth.feature:34)

testcase.name: T-API-15 - Verify that Logout must invalidate the admin session token

failure.message: [after logout the session token must be rejected (401)] expected: 401 but was: 200

testcase.failure: [after logout the session token must be rejected (401)] expected: 401 but was: 200
testcase.system-err: [after logout the session token must be rejected (401)] expected: 401 but was: 200 qatraining.steps.ApiAuthSteps.tokenRejectedAfterLogout(ApiAuthSteps.java:99) ✽.validate the token should be rejected for "/api/categories"(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/auth/api_auth.feature:45)

testcase.name: T-API-16 - Verify that Login token carries the correct role per user
T-API-17 - Verify that A user token works across protected GET endpoints
T-API-18 - Verify that A user token is forbidden on an admin-only endpoint
T-API-19 - Verify that A protected endpoint without a token is unauthorized
T-API-20 - Verify that Login with a non-existent user must return a 400 ErrorResponse
testcase.system-err: expected: 400 but was: 401 qatraining.steps.ApiAuthSteps.statusShouldBe(ApiAuthSteps.java:68) ✽.validate the auth response status should be 400(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/auth/api_auth.feature:78)
